prestazioni: Supercharged Toyota 2ZZ-GE (1.8L, engine code: 2ZZ-GE) with a Magnus Motorsports Stage 2+ supercharger pulley upgrade (62mm, reducing boost lag and increasing peak boost to 12 psi), paired with a custom-mapped ECU flash via LotusTune's 'SC130' calibration for 220+ whp on 98 RON fuel

Full titanium exhaust system by Berk Technology with 2.25-inch primary headers, 3-inch merge collectors, and a straight-pipe center section (no muffler) for optimal scavenging, reducing backpressure by 40% while maintaining legal noise levels (98 dB at 4500 RPM)

Ohlins DFV (Dual Flow Valve) coilovers with 8-position adjustable compression and rebound damping, custom-valved for the Elise SC's 720 kg curb weight, paired with Eibach ERS 1000N/mm front and 900N/mm rear springs for a 30mm drop and optimized roll stiffness
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber 'Type 72' front splitter with integrated brake ducts, designed specifically for the Elise SC's aluminum tub (part #RML-ELISE-SC-FS-01), reducing front lift by 18% at 100 mph

Seibon Carbon fiber 'GT' rear wing (part #SEI-ELISE-GT-RW) with a 1200mm span and 30mm Gurney flap, adjustable from 0-12 degrees of attack, generating 45 kg of downforce at 120 mph (tested in MIRA wind tunnel)

Custom 'Motorsport' livery by Voodoo Vinyls, featuring a matte anthracite base with metallic silver 'Lotus Racing Green' pinstripes (Pantone 355 C) and carbon fiber weave accents on the hood and mirrors, applied with 3M 1080 wrap for durability
